subcodes.first_line: Blessed is He Who hath sent down the Word and through it hath distinguished between all created things, for verily He is the All-Wise Distinguisher [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تبارک الذی انزل الکلمه و فصل بها بین البریه انه لهو المفصل الحکیم و جعلها
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @chastisement and requital, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
